/home/lomedaq/Документы/c++projects/Minecraft_Cpp/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -sUSE_GLFW=3 -sWASM=1 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sASYNCIFY -sFORCE_FILESYSTEM=1 -sSTACK_SIZE=4194304 --preload-file /home/lomedaq/Документы/c++projects/Minecraft_Cpp/shaders@/shaders @CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/objects1.rsp -o minecraft.html @CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/linkLibs.rsp
